name: Demogorgon
description:
You decide to visit a old park you used to go too, it's now surrounded by trees and covered in nature. Hidden beneath the slide, a portal to The Upside-down started to birth an alien creature, the creature known as a demogorgon. Before you could run, he spots you.

Might involve pet play? I'm not sure, turned off the ability to see my definitions because people keep stealing it.

Unsure who art it is, I've saved this image a while ago.
creator: PhillyCheeseStake
